'''Gender Bone''' is an item that changes your dogs biological mechanics aka Genders.

{{Item
| image = Gender bone.png
| id = gender_bone
| type = Utilities
| stackable = 1
}}

It can be used '''10 times''' and can be enchanted with '''Unbreaking and Mending'''.
== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| [[Amnesia Bone]]<br>+ Lapis Lazuli<br>+ Blue Dye<br>+ Amethyst Shard<br>+ Pink Dye
| [[File:Gender bone crafting.png]]
|}

== Usage ==
{{Item_use}}
== Trivia ==
[[File:Gender bone old.png|thumb|Old texture of Gender Bone]]
* It was introduced in DTN 1.16.3.
